features: F4: Unit Tests for Pure Functions (meta-tests/test-utils-pure.bats)

criteria.description: File meta-tests/test-utils-pure.bats exists and loads the test helper via 'load helpers/test-helper'
criteria.testSteps: Verify meta-tests/test-utils-pure.bats exists. Read the file and confirm it contains "load 'helpers/test-helper'" (or equivalent load directive).
criteria.threshold: File exists and loads test-helper

criteria.description: test-utils-pure.bats sources harness/lib/utils.sh via the source_harness_lib helper so all pure functions are available
criteria.testSteps: Read test-utils-pure.bats. Verify it calls source_harness_lib 'utils.sh' (either in a setup function or at the top level) before any tests run.
criteria.threshold: source_harness_lib 'utils.sh' is called before tests execute

criteria.description: slugify: converts uppercase to lowercase
criteria.testSteps: Run test-utils-pure.bats. Verify a test exists and passes that checks slugify converts 'Hello World' or similar mixed-case input to all lowercase output.
criteria.threshold: Test passes, e.g. slugify 'HELLO' produces 'hello'

criteria.description: slugify: replaces special characters with hyphens
criteria.testSteps: Run test-utils-pure.bats. Verify a test exists and passes that checks slugify replaces non-alphanumeric characters (spaces, underscores, dots, etc.) with hyphens.
criteria.threshold: Test passes, e.g. slugify 'hello world' produces 'hello-world'

criteria.description: slugify: collapses consecutive special characters into a single hyphen
criteria.testSteps: Run test-utils-pure.bats. Verify a test exists and passes that checks slugify collapses multiple consecutive special characters (e.g., '---', '  ', '!@#') into a single hyphen.
criteria.threshold: Test passes, e.g. slugify 'hello---world' produces 'hello-world'

criteria.description: slugify: strips leading and trailing hyphens
criteria.testSteps: Run test-utils-pure.bats. Verify a test exists and passes that checks slugify removes leading/trailing hyphens from the result.
criteria.threshold: Test passes, e.g. slugify '---hello---' produces 'hello'

criteria.description: slugify: truncates output to 50 characters
criteria.testSteps: Run test-utils-pure.bats. Verify a test exists and passes that provides input longer than 50 characters and verifies the output is at most 50 characters.
criteria.threshold: Test passes, output length <= 50

criteria.description: slugify: handles empty string input
criteria.testSteps: Run test-utils-pure.bats. Verify a test exists and passes that calls slugify with an empty string and verifies the result is empty or a defined sentinel.
criteria.threshold: Test passes, slugify '' produces empty string

criteria.description: slugify: passes through already-slugified input unchanged
criteria.testSteps: Run test-utils-pure.bats. Verify a test exists and passes that calls slugify with input that is already in slug form (e.g., 'already-slugified') and verifies output matches input.
criteria.threshold: Test passes, slugify 'already-slugified' produces 'already-slugified'

criteria.description: slugify: handles spaces and tabs correctly
criteria.testSteps: Run test-utils-pure.bats. Verify a test exists and passes that calls slugify with input containing spaces and/or tabs and verifies they are replaced with hyphens.
criteria.threshold: Test passes, spaces and tabs become hyphens

criteria.description: slugify: handles mixed case with numbers
criteria.testSteps: Run test-utils-pure.bats. Verify a test exists and passes that calls slugify with input like 'Build V2 App' and verifies correct slug output (e.g., 'build-v2-app').
criteria.threshold: Test passes, mixed case with numbers produces correct slug

criteria.description: sprint_pad: pads single digit to two digits with leading zero
criteria.testSteps: Run test-utils-pure.bats. Verify a test exists and passes that checks sprint_pad 3 produces '03'.
criteria.threshold: Test passes, sprint_pad 3 == '03'

criteria.description: sprint_pad: preserves double-digit numbers as-is
criteria.testSteps: Run test-utils-pure.bats. Verify a test exists and passes that checks sprint_pad 12 produces '12'.
criteria.threshold: Test passes, sprint_pad 12 == '12'

criteria.description: sprint_pad: pads zero to '00'
criteria.testSteps: Run test-utils-pure.bats. Verify a test exists and passes that checks sprint_pad 0 produces '00'.
criteria.threshold: Test passes, sprint_pad 0 == '00'

criteria.description: sprint_pad: handles large numbers (100+) without truncation
criteria.testSteps: Run test-utils-pure.bats. Verify a test exists and passes that checks sprint_pad 100 produces '100' (not truncated to 2 digits).
criteria.threshold: Test passes, sprint_pad 100 == '100'

criteria.description: sprint_dir: constructs correct path for single-digit sprint number
criteria.testSteps: Run test-utils-pure.bats. Verify a test exists and passes that checks sprint_dir 3 produces 'harness-state/sprints/sprint-03' (or equivalent with HARNESS_STATE prefix).
criteria.threshold: Test passes with correct path including zero-padded sprint number

criteria.description: sprint_dir: constructs correct path for double-digit sprint number
criteria.testSteps: Run test-utils-pure.bats. Verify a test exists and passes that checks sprint_dir 12 produces correct path ending in 'sprint-12'.
criteria.threshold: Test passes with correct path

criteria.description: sprint_dir: respects HARNESS_STATE environment variable override
criteria.testSteps: Run test-utils-pure.bats. Verify a test exists and passes that sets HARNESS_STATE to a custom value (e.g., 'custom-state') and verifies sprint_dir uses that prefix in the output path.
criteria.threshold: Test passes, output uses custom HARNESS_STATE value

criteria.description: json_read: reads a top-level field from a JSON file
criteria.testSteps: Run test-utils-pure.bats. Verify a test exists and passes that creates a JSON file with a top-level field and checks json_read returns the correct value.
criteria.threshold: Test passes, correct value returned

criteria.description: json_read: reads a nested field using dot-path notation
criteria.testSteps: Run test-utils-pure.bats. Verify a test exists and passes that reads a nested field (e.g., '.git.branch') from a JSON file.
criteria.threshold: Test passes, nested value returned correctly

criteria.description: json_read: reads an array element
criteria.testSteps: Run test-utils-pure.bats. Verify a test exists and passes that reads an array element (e.g., '.sprints[0].name') from a JSON file.
criteria.threshold: Test passes, correct array element value returned

criteria.description: json_read: returns empty string for missing/nonexistent file
criteria.testSteps: Run test-utils-pure.bats. Verify a test exists and passes that calls json_read on a file that does not exist and verifies the result is an empty string.
criteria.threshold: Test passes, empty string returned for missing file

criteria.description: json_read: returns empty/null for missing field in valid JSON
criteria.testSteps: Run test-utils-pure.bats. Verify a test exists and passes that reads a field that does not exist in a valid JSON file and verifies the return is empty or 'null'.
criteria.threshold: Test passes, empty or 'null' returned for missing field

criteria.description: json_read: handles malformed JSON gracefully without crashing
criteria.testSteps: Run test-utils-pure.bats. Verify a test exists and passes that calls json_read on a file containing malformed JSON (e.g., '{invalid}') and verifies it returns empty string without a non-zero exit code propagating.
criteria.threshold: Test passes, no crash, empty string returned

criteria.description: file_exists: returns true (exit 0) for a non-empty file
criteria.testSteps: Run test-utils-pure.bats. Verify a test exists and passes that creates a file with content and verifies file_exists returns exit code 0.
criteria.threshold: Test passes, exit code 0

criteria.description: file_exists: returns false (exit non-zero) for a missing file
criteria.testSteps: Run test-utils-pure.bats. Verify a test exists and passes that calls file_exists on a path that does not exist and verifies exit code is non-zero.
criteria.threshold: Test passes, exit code non-zero

criteria.description: file_exists: returns false (exit non-zero) for an empty file (zero bytes)
criteria.testSteps: Run test-utils-pure.bats. Verify a test exists and passes that creates an empty file (touch) and verifies file_exists returns non-zero.
criteria.threshold: Test passes, exit code non-zero for empty file

criteria.description: file_exists: returns false (exit non-zero) for a directory path
criteria.testSteps: Run test-utils-pure.bats. Verify a test exists and passes that passes a directory path to file_exists and verifies exit code is non-zero.
criteria.threshold: Test passes, exit code non-zero for directory

criteria.description: All tests in test-utils-pure.bats pass when run via bash meta-tests/run.sh
criteria.testSteps: Run: bash meta-tests/run.sh --filter 'slugify|sprint_pad|sprint_dir|json_read|file_exists' 2>&1 (or simply run bash meta-tests/run.sh). Verify exit code 0 and all tests in test-utils-pure.bats pass.
criteria.threshold: Exit code 0, all tests pass

criteria.description: Test names are self-documenting sentences that identify the function under test and the specific behavior (e.g., 'slugify: collapses consecutive hyphens')
criteria.testSteps: Read test-utils-pure.bats. Verify every @test name follows the pattern 'function_name: description of behavior'. Each test name should clearly identify which function is being tested and what specific behavior is asserted.
criteria.threshold: All @test names follow 'function: behavior' naming convention

outOfScope: State management function tests (Sprint 3: test-utils-state.bats -- init_harness_state, log_cost, update_progress, update_handoff, update_regression_registry)
Edge case and error handling tests (Sprint 6: test-edge-cases.bats)
Any modifications to the existing harness source code in harness/lib/utils.sh
Any modifications to the existing tests/ directory
Any modifications to sprint 1 deliverables (run.sh, test-helper.bash, fixtures, test-infrastructure.bats)
